---
title: "Ricardo Ruiz Sánchez" # if using a built-in template, this title appears under your photo
image: media/gima_all.png # great spot for your professional headshot :) 
toc: false # remove "On this page" table of contents
format:
  html:
    page-layout: custom
editor: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

::: grid
::: g-col-2
This column serves as the left margin
:::

::: g-col-9
::: grid
::: g-col-6
![](/media/gima_all.png)
:::

Data-driven environmental scientist with a passion for geographical
information data. Started collecting data from the laboratory as a
technician, I graduated in Environmental Sciences understanding the
value of making informed-decisions towards a sustainable future. Along
this journey I lived in Scotland and Germany. Drafted by the interest on
geospatial data from the GIMA¹ master, I am enthusiastic to land an
internship in a GIS working environment.

This column serves as the right margin
:::
:::
:::
